title: Web Or Research Task
description: Search or fetch sources, optionally summarize noisy content, then synthesize a final answer.
when_to_use: The user asks to search the web, gather sources, or answer using current external information.
The registered tool list includes an appropriate search or fetch tool.
skeleton: tool: search or fetch the relevant source(s)
summary: condense noisy source output only if downstream nodes need a cleaner context
result: answer the user with the sourced findings
adaptation_notes: Do not invent web tools. If no search/fetch tool is registered, emit a rejection.
Use multiple tool nodes only when independent searches or sources are genuinely needed.
Prefer result directly after one concise tool result; add summary/synthesis only when they reduce noise or combine facts.
